text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, Marvey and Teio!☆ So, presents? 
What'd you get?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
I got you something very marvelous☆ 
The wrapping is marvelous, and the inside 
is marvelous too★

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ohh, I know what it is — can't fool Maya! 
And you, Teio? Don't keep me waiting!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Nghh, I spent a few days thinking about it, 
but I haven't been able to decide. What's 
something that would be just as marvelous?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! How about I give you a special 
peek at a marvelous fighting game technique
of mine? The secret "Teio Spin"!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
It's so good, no one's been able to beat it yet.
I'll show you as many times as you want. 
So, how about it?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: No, no, I appreciate it, but… are you sure?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
If you let me learn it, it's never gonna work 
on me again☆

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Marvelous☆ If I teach everyone
how to dodge it, the whole school
will be marvelous♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Aww man, I really messed up!
